opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with no booking tools detected on site or GMB profile.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing calls in Boise go unanswered, sending urgent leads to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture and confirm appointments automatically.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact method confirmed.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise customers is lost with zero follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture that logs caller details and triggers automatic follow-up sequences.

opportunities.label: Customer Reactivation Campaign
opportunities.signal: 156 reviews suggest an established customer base with no email marketing or re-engagement tools evident.
opportunities.observation: Pipeline Plumbing has a dormant Boise customer list generating zero repeat or referral revenue.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to identify lapsed customers and send automated seasonal reactivation outreach campaigns.
